title: Indulgent Slovakian Christmas Pudding Pancakes
description: Savory and springy pancakes infused with leftover Christmas pudding, perfect for a Buddhist temple friendly festive lunch.
instructions: In a mixing bowl whisk flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder until well combined.
Add almond milk, eggs, and vanilla; whisk until smooth batter forms.
Fold in the chopped Christmas pudding until evenly distributed.
Heat a lightly oiled iron teppan over medium heat and pour a ladleful of batter onto the surface.
Cook the pancake for about 2 minutes until bubbles form and the edges set.
Flip the pancake and cook the other side for 1 minute, then remove from the pan.
Repeat steps 4-6 until all batter is used, greasing the pan as needed.
While pancakes are resting, melt butter in a small saucepan and drizzle over the stack.
Garnish with optional dried fruits and a sprinkle of cinnamon if desired.
Serve warm as a festive brunch or light dinner.
